name: publicWeb_getGlobalCalendar
description: Returns one row per (event date, kennel) for all kennels with publicly visible events in the given date window. All kennels are included regardless of whether they have a KennelWebsite row — logo and colour are NULL for unconfigured kennels and the frontend falls back to an initial-letter placeholder. Used by the harriercentral.com global run calendar with load-more pagination.

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Start date (inclusive). Defaults to today (UTC) if NULL.

parameters.name: daysLimit
parameters.description: Number of days to include (default 30, clamped to 1–365).

rowsets.name: Sentinel
rowsets.description: Always returns a single row (CalendarAvailable = 1) so the shim does not emit HTTP 404 when the calendar window has no events. An empty window is a valid response, not a missing resource.

rowsets.name: CalendarRows
rowsets.description: One row per (EventDate, Kennel) combination. DISTINCT collapses multiple events on the same day for the same kennel. Ordered by EventDate ASC, KennelName ASC. Empty rowset = no events in the date window.

columns.name: EventDate
columns.description: Local date of the event as stored in EventStartDatetime (datetimeoffset cast to DATE).

columns.name: KennelSlug
columns.description: URL slug (Kennel.KennelUniqueShortName). Used to build the kennel homepage URL.

columns.name: KennelName
columns.description: Full kennel name for display and alt text.

columns.name: KennelLogo
columns.description: Logo URL from HC.KennelWebsite.LogoUrl. May be NULL or a bundle:// ref — caller should check for https:// prefix before rendering as an image.

columns.name: PrimaryColor
columns.description: CSS hex colour from HC.KennelWebsite.PrimaryColor. Used as the background for the logo placeholder when no valid image URL is available.

columns.name: PublicKennelId
columns.description: Public kennel GUID. Used as a stable React list key.

columns.name: EventNumber
columns.description: MIN(EventNumber) for this kennel on this date. Used to build the run detail URL (/runs/{EventNumber}). May be 0 for uncounted events; caller falls back to the kennel homepage in that case.

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never remove the sentinel rowset (rowset 0) — callers rely on it to distinguish empty-window from error
